prompt: Prepare a concise broad-market macro snapshot using structured macro/rates data and cite the source. Include the latest CPI trend, Fed funds context, and what changed versus the prior observation.

fixtureOutput.text: CPI cooled from the prior observation of 3.4% to 3.2%, while Fed funds context remained restrictive. [FRED](https://fred.stlouisfed.org/)

prompt: Analyze a public company income statement, calculate gross margin and operating margin, and separate reported facts from computed values.

fixtureOutput.text: Reported facts: revenue was 100.0 and gross profit was 43.0. Computed values: gross margin was 43.0% and operating margin was 21.0%. [FMP](https://financialmodelingprep.com/)

prompt: Create a GDPval-style finance workbook summarizing revenue, expense, and contribution margin by segment. The deliverable must include a spreadsheet artifact and a short memo.

fixtureOutput.text: Memo: the spreadsheet summarizes revenue, expense, and contribution margin by segment.
